body:
Bead agent-be5c1ea6 (fizeau echo Role + CorrelationID into Final + RoutingDecision events + session-log header) — no_changes.

State at base-rev 4c4338a02a9251e4e63e854785cbff06f4d175e3: all five acceptance criteria are already satisfied by code committed prior to this execution attempt. Verified by running `go test -v -run TestRoleAndCorrelationID .` — all 8 subtests pass.

Evidence per AC:

AC1 — Final event Metadata includes role + correlation_id when set on the request.
  Implementation: service_execute.go:1431-1432 (finalizeAndEmit calls
  metaWithRoleAndCorrelation(meta, req.Role, req.CorrelationID) and
  assigns the result to the final ServiceEvent.Metadata).
  Helper: role_correlation.go:metaWithRoleAndCorrelation.
  Test: service_role_correlation_test.go::TestRoleAndCorrelationID_EchoedIntoRoutingDecisionAndFinal
  (asserts ev.Metadata["role"] and ev.Metadata["correlation_id"] on the
  final event) — PASS.

AC2 — RoutingDecision event Metadata includes them.
  Implementation: service_execute.go:418-421 (routingMeta :=
  metaWithRoleAndCorrelation(meta, req.Role, req.CorrelationID), used
  as the routing_decision event Metadata).
  Test: same TestRoleAndCorrelationID_EchoedIntoRoutingDecisionAndFinal
  routing_decision branch — PASS.

AC3 — Session log header has one entry per session.
  Implementation: service_session_log.go:43-46 (headerMeta :=
  metaWithRoleAndCorrelation(req.Metadata, req.Role, req.CorrelationID)
  written into the session.start record at the head of the JSONL log).
  Test: TestRoleAndCorrelationID_EchoedIntoSessionLogHeader (parses the
  first line of the session log, asserts type=="session.start" and the
  Metadata carries role + correlation_id) — PASS.

AC4 — text_delta events do NOT include them in Metadata.
  Implementation: the text_delta emission path does not call
  metaWithRoleAndCorrelation; only caller-supplied non-reserved
  Metadata keys flow through (existing echo path).
  Test: TestRoleAndCorrelationID_NotEchoedIntoTextDelta (asserts neither
  "role" nor "correlation_id" appears on any text_delta event Metadata)
  — PASS.

AC5 — Test fixture covers all four behaviors.
  service_role_correlation_test.go contains the four targeted cases
  above plus collateral coverage (collision warning, validators,
  routing parity). All pass.

Conclusion: bead's contract is met by current tree; no code change is
required. Recording no_changes per execute-bead instructions ("a
well-justified no_changes beats a bad commit"). The prior commit that
landed this work is 8c0cca7 ("feat(contract): add Role + CorrelationID
+ Power to CONTRACT-003 [agent-3bb96bf5]"); this bead's scope was
included in that change rather than left as a follow-up.
rationale: Bead agent-be5c1ea6 (fizeau echo Role + CorrelationID into Final + RoutingDecision events + session-log header) — no_changes.
